data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Google employs a microservices architecture to enable scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed monolithic applications into independent, deployable services.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Uses advanced load balancing techniques to distribute workload across resources.
data.technical_spec: Global and regional load balancing with traffic scaling.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Replicates data across multiple data centers to ensure availability and fault tolerance.

data.title: Edge Caching
data.description: Uses edge caching to reduce latency and improve performance.
data.technical_spec: Content delivery networks (CDNs) at strategic locations.

data.title: Service Mesh
data.description: Implemented service mesh for observability and security in services communication.
data.technical_spec: Use of container orchestration platforms like Kubernetes.
